sample_inputs.name: Senior Backend Engineer (FinTech)
sample_inputs.job_description:
We are hiring a Senior Backend Engineer at FinFlow (FinTech startup, Series B).

Role: Senior Backend Engineer
Location: Bangalore (Hybrid)
Experience: 5-8 years

Requirements:
- Strong proficiency in Python (FastAPI or Django)
- Experience with PostgreSQL, Redis, and Kafka
- Kubernetes and Docker in production
- Microservices architecture design
- AWS (EC2, RDS, Lambda, S3)

Nice to have:
- FinTech / payments domain experience
- Compliance experience (PCI-DSS)

Compensation: ₹35–50 LPA
Team size: 8 engineers reporting to CTO

sample_inputs.name: ML Engineer – LLMs
sample_inputs.job_description:
Stealth AI startup building enterprise LLM applications seeks an ML Engineer.

Location: Remote
Experience: 3-6 years

Must have:
- PyTorch, Transformers (Hugging Face)
- LLM fine-tuning (LoRA, QLoRA, RLHF)
- RAG pipeline development
- Vector databases (Pinecone, Weaviate)
- LangChain / LlamaIndex

Compensation: ₹30–50 LPA + equity

key_responsibilities: Design and build scalable payment processing APIs
Collaborate with product and ML teams

ranked_shortlist.name: Arjun Sharma
ranked_shortlist.title: Senior Backend Engineer
ranked_shortlist.match_reasoning: Arjun is an exceptional match — 9 of 9 required skills hit directly. His Flipkart microservices experience at 10M+ user scale maps perfectly. Hybrid Bangalore availability is ideal.
ranked_shortlist.interest_reasoning: Responded enthusiastically and asked targeted questions about the team and product. Salary range is aligned. Notice period is workable.

ranked_shortlist.name: Vikram Singh
ranked_shortlist.title: DevOps / Cloud Engineer
ranked_shortlist.match_reasoning: Strong on infrastructure stack but lacks direct backend API development experience. Immediate availability and high interest are significant advantages.
ranked_shortlist.interest_reasoning: Actively looking and responded immediately with strong interest. Currently unemployed so highly motivated.
ranked_shortlist.next_action: Send full JD and set up technical screen

ranked_shortlist.name: Meera Iyer
ranked_shortlist.title: Senior Data Engineer
ranked_shortlist.match_reasoning: Strong data engineering background with Kafka and Python expertise. Primarily a data engineer, not backend API developer — would need upskilling on FastAPI.
ranked_shortlist.interest_reasoning: Interested but cautious — asked whether the role is purely backend or has data engineering components.

conversation.message: Hi Arjun! Impressive work at Flipkart — leading the microservices migration serving 10M+ users is exactly the kind of scale we're looking for. We have a Senior Backend Engineering role at a Series B FinTech (payments domain) — Python/FastAPI, Kafka, K8s stack. Would love to share more. Open to a quick 15-min chat this week?

Hi! Thanks for the personalized message — really appreciate that you looked at my actual work. The FinTech + microservices angle is interesting. I'm at Flipkart but open to hearing more. What's the company and what's the engineering challenge specifically?

The company is FinFlow — processing ₹500Cr+ in monthly transactions for SMBs. The core challenge is rebuilding their payment processing engine to handle 10x transaction volume. It's a senior IC role with tech lead trajectory. Team of 8, reporting directly to CTO. Comp: ₹35–50 LPA + ESOPs.

That sounds genuinely interesting — the scale challenge and FinTech domain are both things I want more exposure to. Salary band works. I'm on a 2-month notice but open to discussing. Could you share the full JD? Happy to set up a call Thursday or Friday if that works.

outreach_sample.next_action: Schedule 30-min intro call — candidate is warm and aligned on salary
